mapper.select: SELECT SEARCH_ID AS branchId, BRNCH_MK AS branchType, BRNCH_CD AS branchCd, FLDBRNAME AS branchName, FLDBRTEL1 AS branchTel1, FLDBRTEL2 AS branchTel2, FLDBRTEL3 AS branchTel3, FLDJUSO AS branchAddress FROM TBLBRANCH WHERE ( FLDBRNAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR FLDJUSO LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' ) AND (BRNCH_MK = '1' OR BRNCH_MK = '2' OR BRNCH_MK = '4') ORDER BY FLDBRNAME ASC WITH UR

SELECT TRIM(CLERK_NO) AS CLERK_NO, EMPLY_NM, BRNCH_NO, DEPT_NM FROM PRDCT_SGGSTR_INFO WHERE EMPLY_NM LIKE '%'||#{emplyNm}||'%'
AND CLERK_NO = #{clerkNo}
AND (BANCA_GB <> 'Y' OR BANCA_GB IS NULL)
ORDER BY EMPLY_NM WITH UR
